ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal species */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the animal species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the animal species */,
  "class_" TEXT /* Class of the animal species */,
  "order_" TEXT /* Order of the animal species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the animal species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the animal species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal species */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic, arboreal) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable, least concern) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "social_structure" TEXT /* Social structure (e.g., solitary, pack, herd) */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_class_ FOREIGN KEY ("class_") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genera ("genus_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_kingdom FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_phylum FOREIGN KEY ("phylum") REFERENCES phyla ("phylum_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_order_ FOREIGN KEY ("order_") REFERENCES orders ("order_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kingdom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phyla" (
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylum */,
  "phylum_name" TEXT /* Name of the phylum */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Kingdom the phylum belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phylum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phylum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phyla_kingdom_id FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom_id") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Phylum the class belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_phylum_id FOREIGN KEY ("phylum_id") REFERENCES phyla ("phylum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class the order belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order the family belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Family the genus belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genera_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Genus the species belongs to */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable, least concern) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "male_name" TEXT /* Name of the male animal */,
  "female_name" TEXT /* Name of the female animal */,
  "baby_name" TEXT /* Name of the baby animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_size" TEXT /* Average size of the group */,
  "social_behavior" TEXT /* Social behavior of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
